name: submissions_create
description: Generate a filled PDF by merging data into a template. The data object must match the template's field schema. Supports synchronous mode (via sync.api.docspring.com) and asynchronous mode. Test PDFs are free but watermarked.

parameters.name: template_id
parameters.description: The ID of the template to generate from.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Field values matching the template schema. Keys are field names, values are the data to fill.

parameters.name: test
parameters.description: If true, generates a watermarked test PDF (free). Default: false.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Optional metadata returned in webhooks (e.g., { pdf_filename: 'invoice.pdf' }).

parameters.name: wait
parameters.description: If true, waits for processing to complete (synchronous). Default depends on base URL.

parameters.name: editable
parameters.description: If true, generates an editable PDF with fillable form fields.

parameters.name: expires_in
parameters.description: TTL in seconds for the download link.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Template version: 'draft', 'latest', or specific version like '1.2.3'.

parameters.name: field_overrides
parameters.description: Temporarily override field requirements or defaults.
